rulings.Case Title: LAURA ESMERALDA CONTRERAS VS. CAROL BUTERWORTH et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion And Motion For Leave To File Fourth Amended Complaint
rulings.Rulings: Unlawful Detainer Law and Motion Calendar for Thursday, December 6, 2012, line 1. PLAINTIFF LAURA CONTRERAS' Motion For Leave To File Fourth Amended Complaint. Continued to January 11, 2013. Opposing party to comply with San Francisco Local Rule 2.6B and provide courtesy copy of opposition no later than December 14, 2012. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: LAURA ESMERALDA CONTRERAS VS. CAROL BUTERWORTH et al
rulings.Rulings: Unlawful Detainer Law and Motion Calendar for Thursday, December 6, 2012, line 1. DEFENDANT STEVEN STUART's DEMURRER TO ANSWER TO COMPLAINT. Continued to January 11, 2013. Moving party to comply with San Francisco Local Rule 2.6B & C and provide courtesy copy of moving papers, reply and operative answer no later than December 14, 2012. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: GREGORY FISCHER et al VS. KSK PROPERTY MANAGEMENT, INC. et al
rulings.Rulings: Unlawful Detainer Law and Motion Calendar for Thursday, December 6, 2012, line 2. CROSS DEFENDANT KSK PROPERTY MANAGEMENT, INC.'s DEMURRER TO FIRST AMENDED CROSS COMPLAINT. 1) Sustain with leave to amend; a) Breach of contract to allege all elements and supportive facts; b) Fraud to allege with particularity. 2) Sustain without leave to amend as to negligence not addressed in opposition. 3) Sustain without leave to amend as to common counts because acknowledges no work by landlord. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: MAUREEN KEATING VS. JOANNE DAKE, INDIVIDUALLY AND AS ADMINISTRATOR et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion And Motion For Leave To File A First Amended Complaint For Damages And For Reclassification Of This Case As Unlimited
rulings.Rulings: Unlawful Detainer Law and Motion Calendar for Thursday, December 6, 2012, line 3. PLAINTIFF MAUREEN KEATING's Motion For Leave To File A First Amended Complaint For Damages And For Reclassification Of This Case As Unlimited. Deny without prejudice. Moving party failed to comply with CCP 1005 and CRC 3.1324(b). = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: DEUTSCHE BANK NATIONAL TRUST COMPANY VS. DONALD L. GALLERANI JR et al
rulings.Rulings: Unlawful Detainer Law and Motion Calendar for Thursday, December 6, 2012, line 5. PLAINTIFF DEUTSCHE BANK NATIONAL TRUST COMPANY'S MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT. Grant Motion for Summary Judgment. Plaintiff shifted burden and defendant failed to provide competent evidence to create a triable issue of material fact. 1) Affidavit of Service of Notice of Default; 2) Notice of Trustee Sale; 3) No authority re triable issue of material fact in UD for non compliance with CC 2923.5; 4) No tender. = (501/REQ)
